title: Neutral situation — Claire must reason cold and raise a real objection

input.situation: A small research team can keep maintaining a tool they built themselves, or switch to a third-party service that does the same job for a monthly fee. The self-built tool works today but takes about a day of upkeep each month. The paid service would remove that upkeep but the data would then live on the vendor's servers. The team has to choose within two weeks.
